# P1 Plan Identifier TP Fixture

This plan introduces plan-structural identifiers that are used exactly once
with no definition or cross-reference.  P1 must flag these.

## Overview

The `WidgetRegistry` component handles widget lifecycle management.

The requirement SC-91 governs the eviction policy for stale entries.

Both identifiers above are introduced once in this document with no second
mention, no definition section, and no cross-reference.  P1 must fire on
each of them.

## Design

The design follows standard factory patterns.  No further mention of
WidgetRegistry or SC-91 appears in this document.
